original_image_tags: A vertical scan of a page that appears to be the reverse side of a document. The main area is largely blank, showing the paper's texture and faint bleed-through of typed text from the other side. At the top edge, there are two large, dark, circular punch-hole marks and a smaller, central puncture mark. At the bottom, there is a blue ink stamp.

elements.description: One blue ink stamp in the bottom left corner. Text reads: 'JAN 14 9 26 AM '55', 'SEC'D ESPIONAGE', 'F B I', 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE'.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the presence of a blue ink stamp, but description B adds specific, detailed text it claims is inside the stamp while description A does not mention or contradict this text.
